draftProps.title: Snapshot do banco de dados
draftProps.description: Foto instantanea do banco PostgreSQL: contagem de objetos e colunas.

publishedProps.title: Snapshot do banco de dados
publishedProps.description: Foto instantanea do banco PostgreSQL: contagem de objetos e colunas.

draftDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value, 'Views' AS label
FROM information_schema.views
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

publishedDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value, 'Views' AS label
FROM information_schema.views
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

draftDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value, 'Tabelas' AS label
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

publishedDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value, 'Tabelas' AS label
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

draftDataBinding.query:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN table_type = 'BASE TABLE' THEN 'Tabelas'
       WHEN table_type = 'VIEW' THEN 'Views'
       ELSE 'Outros' END AS label,
  COUNT(*)::int AS value
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
GROUP BY table_type
ORDER BY value DESC

publishedDataBinding.query:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN table_type = 'BASE TABLE' THEN 'Tabelas'
       WHEN table_type = 'VIEW' THEN 'Views'
       ELSE 'Outros' END AS label,
  COUNT(*)::int AS value
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
GROUP BY table_type
ORDER BY value DESC

draftDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT table_schema)::int AS value, 'Schemas' AS label
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

publishedDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT table_schema)::int AS value, 'Schemas' AS label
FROM information_schema.tables
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

draftDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value, 'Colunas' AS label
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

publishedDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value, 'Colunas' AS label
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

draftDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value, 'Índices' AS label
FROM pg_indexes
WHERE schemaname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

publishedDataBinding.query:
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS value, 'Índices' AS label
FROM pg_indexes
WHERE schemaname NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')

draftDataBinding.query:
SELECT data_type AS label, COUNT(*)::int AS value
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
GROUP BY data_type
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 12

publishedDataBinding.query:
SELECT data_type AS label, COUNT(*)::int AS value
FROM information_schema.columns
WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('pg_catalog', 'information_schema')
GROUP BY data_type
ORDER BY value DESC
LIMIT 12
